# services.supybot

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.supybot`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.supybot.configFile` | `absolute path` | Path to initial supybot config file. This can be generated by running supybot-wizard. Note: all paths should include the full path to the stateDir directory (backup conf data logs logs/plugins plugins tmp web). |
| `services.supybot.enable` | `boolean` | Enable Supybot, an IRC bot (also known as Limnoria). |
| `services.supybot.extraPackages` | `function that evaluates to a(n) list of package` | Extra Python packages available to supybot plugins. The value must be a function which receives the attrset defined in {var}`python3Packages` as the sole argument. |
| `services.supybot.plugins` | `attribute set of absolute path` | Attribute set of additional plugins that will be symlinked to the {file}`plugin` subdirectory. Please note that you still need to add the plugins to the config file (or with `!load`) using their attribute name. |
| `services.supybot.stateDir` | `absolute path` | The root directory, logs and plugins are stored here |
